user_prompt: Top 5 things i wished i knew before starting running

openai_plan.theme_title: 5 Things I Wish I Knew Before Running
openai_plan.theme_description: Real talk on running lessons that save you time and frustration. Run smarter, not harder, from day one

slides.caption: 5 things I wish I knew before I started running
slides.shot_direction: wide shot of empty running track at sunrise, no person in frame

slides.caption: You don’t need to start fast, slow wins the race
slides.shot_direction: close-up on runner’s feet gently hitting pavement, soft morning light

slides.caption: Rest days are part of progress, not failure
slides.shot_direction: flat lay of worn running shoes next to a water bottle and a resting journal on wooden floor

slides.caption: A good pair of shoes beats pushing through pain
slides.shot_direction: side profile of runner tying sleek running shoes on park bench, focus on hands and shoes

slides.caption: Consistency beats motivation every single time
slides.shot_direction: POV shot looking down at smartwatch tracking steady pace mid-run on trail

slides.caption: Start with these, your future self will thank you, keep going
slides.shot_direction: hero shot of runner on hilltop at sunset, arms raised in quiet victory, full body
